jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at 91Springboard - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
91Springboard, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 91Springboard:
91Springboard is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 91Springboard!
